primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: The aim of this project was to identify the auto mono-ADP-ribosylation sites on SIRT6 and SIRT7 to study the effect of the point mutations S56A and N189A respectively on their ADP-ribosylation activity.
SIRT7 Wild type and mutant (N189A) samples were analyzed using a Lumos Orbitrap mass spectrometer

primary_variables.matched_definition: Removal or reduction of nutrients (for example glucose starvation, amino acid withdrawal).
evidence: the mono-ADP-ribosylation pattern of SIRT7 was obtained in cells under different stress conditions (UV, H2O2, ionizing Irradiation and glucose starvation).
For GS treatments, MEFs, NIH3T3, and HEK293F cells were treated 24 to 40, 12, and 4 hours, respectively, before harvesting with glucose-free Dulbecco’s modified Eagle’s medium

primary_variables.matched_definition: Redox perturbation caused by pro-oxidant treatment (for example H2O2 exposure).
evidence: the mono-ADP-ribosylation pattern of SIRT7 was obtained in cells under different stress conditions (UV, H2O2, ionizing Irradiation and glucose starvation).
For oxidative stress, cells were treated with 1 mM H2O2 for 1 hour before harvesting.

primary_variables.matched_definition: Exposure to UV or intense light causing photodamage or photostress.
evidence: the mono-ADP-ribosylation pattern of SIRT7 was obtained in cells under different stress conditions (UV, H2O2, ionizing Irradiation and glucose starvation).
Cells were irradiated by exposure in the following conditions: (i) UV irradiation at 254 nm (100 J/m2)

primary_variables.matched_definition: Exposure to X-ray, gamma, or related ionizing radiation sources.
evidence: the mono-ADP-ribosylation pattern of SIRT7 was obtained in cells under different stress conditions (UV, H2O2, ionizing Irradiation and glucose starvation).
gamma irradiation delivered using an aluminum filter at 100 kV peak in a Faxitron cabinet x-ray system
For GS treatments, MEFs, NIH3T3, and HEK293F cells were treated 24 to 40, 12, and 4 hours, respectively, before harvesting with glucose-free Dulbecco’s modified Eagle’s medium
For oxidative stress, cells were treated with 1 mM H2O2 for 1 hour before harvesting.
UV irradiation at 254 nm (100 J/m2) in a Stratagene Stratalinker 2400 UV

replicate_hints: The represented values show means of at least three or more independent experiments (n ≥ 3)

evidence: study the effect of the point mutations S56A and N189A respectively on their ADP-ribosylation activity.
the mono-ADP-ribosylation pattern of SIRT7 was obtained in cells under different stress conditions (UV, H2O2, ionizing Irradiation and glucose starvation).

targets_and_enrichments.ontology_label: Affinity purification coupled with mass spectrometry proteomics

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data-dependent acquisition (DDA) was used on Lumos and Eclipse Orbitrap instruments. While no explicit labeling is mentioned, the comparison of WT vs mutants and stress conditions suggests a label-free quantification (LFQ) approach for site identification and relative abundance.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment specifically targets mono-ADP-ribosylation (mADPR) sites using specialized fragmentation (EThCD) triggered by specific HCD fragment ions (136.0623, 250.0940, 348.0709, 428.0372).
